rationale: Builds directly on the best late LR rebalance path by making the first quant-aware step a real phase change: roundtrip once at phase start, reset Muon/Adam state so stale optimizer moments do not fight the quantized weights, then continue the existing periodic roundtrips. I also removed a redundant float-keep branch to keep the script lean and size-neutral.
title: Quant-Aware Phase-Start Reset
